PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Continued To May-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287341. Robert Mitchell appearing for petitioner. No other appearance made. Trial date is 4/9 on the Master Calendar. Matter is continued to 5/15 for further status. No appearance is required is status report is filed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Mar-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Cochrane (Counsel for Eva Knott, Objector); Robert Mitchell (Counsel for Carol Mitchell, Petitioner).

The Court did not directly address the issue of the validity of the will or probate of the same at this time. After adjournment, the matter was continued to March 6, 2007.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR# 5802; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Cochrane (Counsel for Eva Knott, Objector); Robert Mitchell (Counsel for Carol Mitchell, Petitioner).

As for the Motion for Summary Adjudication, counsel in general submitted the matter on the pleadings but Mr. Cochrane noted briefly in opposition that the issues presented by the Motion would not be dispositive of any issue or issues in the case but would instead function to shift the burden of proof at time of trial, not a proper function for a motion for summary adjudication. Mr. Mitchell noted that while burden shifting would be one consequence of the MSA, it could also be dispositive of certain affirmative defenses in the case. The Court took the matter under submission.

At the request of counsel, the matter was also referred to Dept. 1 for trial setting by Minute Order signed in open court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR# 5802; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2006 Continued To Nov-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case no. 287341. Robert Mitchell appearing for petitioner Carol Mitchell. Michael Cochrane appearing for respondent. Mr. Mitchell is waiting to see what happens in the Supreme Court. Both sides want a trial date. Trial will take two weeks. Court will refer this matter to the Presiding Judge for trial date in the next hearing. Matter is continued to 11/28 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Continued To Jul-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case no. 287341. Robert Mitchell appearing for petitioner. Michael Cochrane appearing for respondent. Mediation was not successful. Mr. Cochrane has substituted in as new counsel in one case only. Mr. Friedenberg is still counsel of record and he is not in court. Mr. Cochrane informs the court that he will be coming in for both case. Discovery is outstanding. Request continuance for 6 weeks. Matter is continued to 7/18. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Continued To Jun-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Bob Mitchell appearing for Carol Mitchell. David Friedenberg appearing for Eva Knott. Ernest Der appearing for and with special administrator Debra Dolch. Parties agree to mediation. Court is referring case to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 5/23. Matter is continued to 6/6. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Continued To Apr-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Advanced From Mar-09-06 To Mar-08-06 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: David Friedenberg appearing for respondent/moving party. His associate Mr. Remak is also in court. Robert Mitchell appearing for contestant/respondent. Oral arguments presented by both counsel. Court finds that there are triable issues. Motion for summary judgment in denied. Motion for summary adjudication is denied. Sanction is reserved. Mr. Mitchell to prepare order with approval as to form. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
